_comment: Cascade-interaction fixture: locks the SPEC §13 decision #30 ordering at the conformance level (not just unit-test). Display recipe `cinematic_fullscreen` sets prominence:hero, sizing:fullscreen, chrome:none, autoplay:muted. Delivery recipe `story_then_play` sets narration_position:before_content, pause_after_narration_seconds:1, audio_ducking_db:-6 (already -6 by default but recipe-stamped). NO conflict on any primitive — display covers visual, delivery covers narration timing — so both fully apply. The fixture proves both arrays are walked and merged in the documented order. (A future conflict-fixture would set chrome on both to verify delivery wins.)
name: Cascade Interaction Conformance Fixture
description: Display + delivery recipe stack on the same item.
